Who I Am

About Me

I am a UI/UX Designer who believes great design should be simple. I have a strong interest in Digital Marketing.

Currently interning as a UI/UX Designer at Gamage Recruiters, Panadura (Oct 2025 – Apr 2026), HND in Information Technology from SLIATE, where I developed a solid grounding in both technical and creative disciplines.

Beyond design, I love creating videos and designs. I'm always curious about new technology, so I've been experimenting with AI tools to create video content. I enjoy trying out these new ways to tell stories and seeing what's possible with the latest digital tools.
